context.usage: 12x12 icon used inside care popup panel.

icon_rules: Icon is readable in a 12x12 grid.
Uses a 1px outline in #1D2B53 where applicable.
No more than 3 internal detail pixels per icon to keep PICO-8 simplicity.

acceptance_criteria: PNG is exactly 12x12px with transparent background.
Uses only the listed colors and transparency; no gradients.
At 1x scale, icon meaning is clear within 1 second (seed / broom / hand).
shared_properties: Asset remains readable at 1x scale on the 128x128 playfield.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering keeps the interface crisp without hiding gameplay.
differences: This icon communicates the pet action with a tiny hand silhouette.
The symbol must stay readable inside the care popup panel.
Finger grouping must remain simple enough for a low-resolution icon.
